releases.author: HWY1dot0
releases.description:
Maintenance release addressing Obsidian automated review.

- Fix build verification: `npm run build` (rollup) now completes in a clean environment; linting/type-checking moved out of the build step.
- Bump svelte 3.35.0 → 3.59.2 and moment 2.29.4 to clear dependency advisories.

No user-facing behavior changes.

releases.author: HWY1dot0
releases.description: Initial Calendar Hub release: find every note created on a given day from one calendar view, with folder filters, filename date matching, frontmatter fallback, and note-count dots.

releases.author: HWY1dot0
releases.description:
# Multi Note Calendar beta

This is a public beta fork of Liam Cain's Calendar plugin for Obsidian.

It is intended for users who keep multiple date-based notes per day across different folders.

## Added in this beta

- Multiple notes per date.
- A selected-day note list below the calendar.
- Vault-wide filename matching.
- Extra filename date formats such as `YYYYMMDD`.
- Frontmatter date fallback.
- Folder filters from both settings and the Calendar sidebar.
- Solid dots represent note count instead of word count.

## Attribution

This fork is based on the original Calendar plugin by Liam Cain:

https://github.com/liamcain/obsidian-calendar-plugin

The original project is MIT licensed, and the original copyright notice remains in place.

## Upstream status

An upstream proposal/PR has been opened. This fork is published under a separate name so users who need this workflow can test it without replacing the official Calendar plugin.

## Beta warning

This fork changes Calendar's date model from one note per date to multiple notes per date. Please test it on a vault you can recover from backup.
releases.name: 0.1.0-beta.1
